title: Architecture block is manually maintained — modules, dependencies, and patterns are derivable from package.json and source
body: The architecture block restates what code inspection provides: module names from package.json, entry files, dependencies, responsibility from package descriptions. These go stale on every code change. A projectArchitecture(cwd) function could derive modules and dependencies from package.json files and entry points, producing the same schema shape as the static block. This would make the architecture block a computed block candidate for issue-020.
